name: Stock Radar — Daily Cycle
description: Run the full orchestrator cycle: data ingestion, agent analysis, prediction scoring. Weekdays at 6:00 AM Eastern, before US market open.

payload.message: Run the Stock Radar daily analysis cycle. Execute: cd /home/pi/stock-radar && source .venv/bin/activate && stock-radar-orchestrate 2>&1. Report the results: how many predictions were generated, any errors, and total duration. If there were errors, summarize what went wrong.

name: Stock Radar — Score Predictions
description: Score mature predictions against actual price movements. Runs at 5:00 PM Eastern after market close on weekdays.

payload.message: Score Stock Radar predictions that have matured. Execute: cd /home/pi/stock-radar && source .venv/bin/activate && stock-radar-score 2>&1. Report the scoring results.
